news.t: Oracle's big stock selloff acts as a big drag on both software and cloud ETFs
Fidelity® Grows Thematic Fund Lineup With Launch of Four New ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FCLD is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 10.61%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 7.55%, Western Digital at 6.74%, Datadog at 4.24%, and Equinix at 3.52%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Cloud Computing ETF (FCLD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity Cloud Computing index, a market-cap-weighted index of global companies that provide products and/or services enabling increased usage of cloud computing. FCLD was launched on Oct 5, 2021 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Oracle's big stock selloff acts as a big drag on both software and cloud ETFs
data.text: Shares of Oracle Corp. ORCL, -12.14% tumbled 12.1% in midday trading toward its biggest one-day selloff in 21 years in the wake of a disappointing earnings report, and were having an oversized drag on...

data.title: Fidelity® Grows Thematic Fund Lineup With Launch of Four New ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity Investments expands thematic fund lineup with the launch of four new thematic ETFs.
